meaning: acute respiratory disease 急性呼吸系统疾病
examples: Their names ard all coming back to me now.
She often says to us, "You cannot study too ard."
Canadian Ryan Ard, visiting from Ottawa, plays a simple melody from a song he's writing on the guitar.
Voles were released in several areas of the Loch Ard forest near Aberfoyle, Stirling, three years ago.
Earlier, the Ard Fheis rejected a call for the party to adopt a freedom of conscience approach to abortion.
